sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, val Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, val, weight) VALUES (1, 10.0, 2), (2, 20.0, 3), (3, 30.0, 1);
UPDATE test_data SET weight = weight + 1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, quantileExactWeighted(0.75)(val, weight) AS quantile_value FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
